description_for_human: Create, audit, and deploy smart contracts with AI-powered multi-agent security scanning across 14 blockchain networks.
description_for_model: Pentagonal is a smart contract forge. It generates production-ready Solidity and Rust/Anchor smart contracts from natural language, audits them with 8 parallel AI security agents (reentrancy, flash loans, access control, gas optimization, oracle manipulation, MEV/front-running, integer overflow, economic exploits), auto-fixes vulnerabilities, and deploys to 14 chains (Ethereum, Polygon, BSC, Arbitrum, Base, Optimism, Avalanche, Solana + 8 testnets). Available as a web app and MCP server for AI IDE integration.
